nm:output.nm:control_stream: $PROBLEM RcppNM bench adv4_trans4 ADVAN=4 TRANS=4 $SUBROUTINE ADVAN4 TRANS4 $INPUT ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II $DATA data.csv IGNORE=@ $THETA (0.3, 3, 30) ; CL (2, 20, 200) ; VC (5, 50, 500) ; VP (1, 10, 100) ; Q2 (0.12, 1.2, 12) ; KA $OMEGA 0.09 0.09 0.09 $SIGMA 0.1 0.5 $PK CL = THETA(1) * exp(ETA(1)) VC = THETA(2) * exp(ETA(2)) VP = THETA(3) Q2 = THETA(4) KA = THETA(5) * exp(ETA(3)) S1 = 1 S2 = VC S3 = VP V2 = VC V3 = VP Q = Q2 $ERROR Y = F * (1 + ERR(1)) + ERR(2) $EST METHOD=1 INTER MAXEVAL=9999 PRINT=1 NOABORT $COVAR PRINT=E
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.

nm:nonmem.nm:license_information: License Registered to: Leiden Academic Center for Drug Research Expiration Date: 14 JAN 2028 Current Date: 25 JUN 2026 Days until program expires : 569
nm:nonmem.nm:program_information: 1NONLINEAR MIXED EFFECTS MODEL PROGRAM (NONMEM) VERSION 7.3.0 ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED BY STUART BEAL, LEWIS SHEINER, AND ALISON BOECKMANN CURRENT DEVELOPERS ARE ROBERT BAUER, ICON DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS, AND ALISON BOECKMANN. IMPLEMENTATION, EFFICIENCY, AND STANDARDIZATION PERFORMED BY NOUS INFOSYSTEMS.

nm:problem.nm:problem_information:
PROBLEM NO.: 1 RcppNM bench adv4_trans4 ADVAN=4 TRANS=4 0DATA CHECKOUT RUN: NO DATA SET LOCATED ON UNIT NO.: 2 THIS UNIT TO BE REWOUND: NO NO. OF DATA RECS IN DATA SET: 70 NO. OF DATA ITEMS IN DATA SET: 9 ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 1 DEP VARIABLE IS DATA ITEM NO.: 3 MDV DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 5 0INDICES PASSED TO SUBROUTINE PRED: 6 2 4 0 8 9 7 0 0 0 0 0LABELS FOR DATA ITEMS: ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II 0FORMAT FOR DATA: (E2.0,E5.0,E9.0,E4.0,4E2.0,E3.0)
TOT. NO. OF OBS RECS: 62 TOT. NO. OF INDIVIDUALS: 6 0LENGTH OF THETA: 5 0DEFAULT THETA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0OMEGA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 3 0DEFAULT OMEGA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0SIGMA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 2 0DEFAULT SIGMA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF THETA: LOWER BOUND INITIAL EST UPPER BOUND 0.3000E+00 0.3000E+01 0.3000E+02 0.2000E+01 0.2000E+02 0.2000E+03 0.5000E+01 0.5000E+02 0.5000E+03 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+03 0.1200E+00 0.1200E+01 0.1200E+02 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF OMEGA: 0.9000E-01 0.0000E+00 0.9000E-01 0.0000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.9000E-01 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF SIGMA: 0.1000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.5000E+00 0COVARIANCE STEP OMITTED: NO EIGENVLS. PRINTED: YES SPECIAL COMPUTATION: NO COMPRESSED FORMAT: NO 0WARNING: THE NUMBER OF PARAMETERS TO BE ESTIMATED EXCEEDS THE NUMBER OF INDIVIDUALS WITH DATA. 0WARNING: FOR AN ASYMPTOTIC ESTIMATE OF THE VARIANCE-COVARIANCE MATRIX OF THE GRADIENT VECTOR, THE COVARIANCE STEP COMPUTES THE S MATRIX. BUT WHEN THE NUMBER OF PARAMETERS TO BE ESTIMATED EXCEEDS THE NUMBER OF INDIVIDUALS WITH DATA, THIS MATRIX CAN BE SINGULAR AND BE A POOR ASYMPTOTIC ESTIMATE. 1DOUBLE PRECISION PREDPP VERSION 7.3.0
TWO COMPARTMENT MODEL WITH FIRST-ORDER ABSORPTION (ADVAN4) 0MAXIMUM NO. OF BASIC PK PARAMETERS: 5 0BASIC PK PARAMETERS (AFTER TRANSLATION): BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 1: ELIMINATION RATE (K) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 2: CENTRAL-TO-PERIPH. RATE (K23) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 3: PERIPH.-TO-CENTRAL RATE (K32) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 5: ABSORPTION RATE (KA) TRANSLATOR WILL CONVERT PARAMETERS CL, V2, Q, V3 TO K, K23, K32 (TRANS4) 0COMPARTMENT ATTRIBUTES COMPT. NO. FUNCTION INITIAL ON/OFF DOSE DEFAULT DEFAULT STATUS ALLOWED ALLOWED FOR DOSE FOR OBS. 1 DEPOT OFF YES YES YES NO 2 CENTRAL ON NO YES NO YES 3 PERIPH. ON NO YES NO NO 4 OUTPUT OFF YES NO NO NO 1 ADDITIONAL PK PARAMETERS - ASSIGNMENT OF ROWS IN GG COMPT. NO. INDICES SCALE BIOAVAIL. ZERO-ORDER ZERO-ORDER ABSORB FRACTION RATE DURATION LAG 1 6 * * * * 2 7 * * * * 3 8 * * * * 4 * - - - - - PARAMETER IS NOT ALLOWED FOR THIS MODEL * PARAMETER IS NOT SUPPLIED BY PK SUBROUTINE; WILL DEFAULT TO ONE IF APPLICABLE 0DATA ITEM INDICES USED BY PRED ARE: EVENT ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 6 TIME DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 2 DOSE AMOUNT DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 4 STEADY STATE DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 8 INTERVAL DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 9 COMPT. NO. DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 7
0PK SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. PK SUBROUTINE NOT CALLED AT NONEVENT (ADDITIONAL OR LAGGED) DOSE TIMES. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD.

nm:estimation.nm:estimation_title: First Order Conditional Estimation with Interaction
nm:estimation.nm:termination_information: 0MINIMIZATION SUCCESSFUL NO. OF FUNCTION EVALUATIONS USED: 432 NO. OF SIG. DIGITS IN FINAL EST.: 3.1 0PARAMETER ESTIMATE IS NEAR ITS BOUNDARY THIS MUST BE ADDRESSED BEFORE THE COVARIANCE STEP CAN BE IMPLEMENTED
